steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for a sentence that emphasizes a similarity between Bear Valley NWR and Moapa Valley NWR. The notes show two parallels: both are NWRs, and both were established to protect an endangered species. A correct answer must explicitly connect both refuges through that shared trait.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘The US has designated more than 500 areas NWRs, including the Bear Valley NWR in Oregon.’: mentions only Bear Valley and focuses on the total count of NWRs nationwide, not on a similarity between the two refuges. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Some NWRs, such as Nevada’s Moapa Valley, were established specifically to protect endangered species.’: mentions only Moapa Valley. Does not explicitly link it to Bear Valley as a shared characteristic. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘While the Bear Valley NWR extends across a 4,200-acre area, the Moapa Valley NWR encompasses only 32 acres.’: contrasts the two refuges by size — the opposite of emphasizing a similarity. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘Both the Bear Valley NWR and the Moapa Valley NWR were established to protect endangered species.’: names both refuges and states their shared purpose directly. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
